events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes structural welding at rough-complete stage with visible undercut/porosity/incomplete fusion defects. AWS D1.1 governs visual inspection acceptance criteria for these weld defects. These are rejectable defects per AWS D1.1.

],
"rationale": "Undercut, porosity, and incomplete fusion are explicitly rejectable discontinuities under AWS D1.1 visual inspection criteria for structural welds. At rough-complete stage these defects compromise joint integrity and must be repaired before closeout.",
